user.title: Connect to Boum
user.description: Sign in with your Boum account to expose your controllers in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Boum
reauth_confirm.description: Your Boum credentials for {email} are no longer working. Enter the new password to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the Boum API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: Something unexpected went wrong. See the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Boum account is already configured.
